blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,255 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
